launchProofEvidenceFields.label: Pages site proof
launchProofEvidenceFields.value: html_url=not available; status=not available; https_enforced=not available
launchProofEvidenceFields.required: GitHub Pages site API must provide html_url, built status, and HTTPS enforcement.
launchProofEvidenceFields.nextAction: Run gh api repos/biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects/pages after the Pages workflow succeeds, then paste html_url, status=built, and https_enforced=true.

launchProofEvidenceFields.label: Pages workflow run proof
launchProofEvidenceFields.required: Latest joopark-pages.yml run must be completed successfully and linked.
launchProofEvidenceFields.nextAction: Run gh run list --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --workflow joopark-pages.yml --limit 1 --json databaseId,status,conclusion,url,headSha,createdAt,updatedAt,event,displayTitle and paste status=completed, conclusion=success, url, and headSha.

launchProofEvidenceFields.label: Drift Watch workflow run proof
launchProofEvidenceFields.required: Latest joopark-drift-watch.yml run must be completed successfully and linked.
launchProofEvidenceFields.nextAction: Run gh run list --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --workflow joopark-drift-watch.yml --limit 1 --json databaseId,status,conclusion,url,headSha,createdAt,updatedAt,event,displayTitle and paste status=completed, conclusion=success, url, and headSha.

launchProofEvidenceFields.label: Evidence freshness proof
launchProofEvidenceFields.required: Saved evidence must be generated after dispatch and remain inside the freshness window.

launchProofEvidenceFields.label: Public claim guard proof

launchProofEvidenceReceipt:
JooPark Launch Proof Evidence Receipt
Status: blocked until live proof
Repo: biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects
Evidence repo: biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects
Repo resolution: source_repo

Evidence fields to fill:
- Pages site proof: html_url=not available; status=not available; https_enforced=not available
- Pages workflow run proof: status=completed; conclusion=failure; url=https://github.com/biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects/actions/runs/27172216103; headSha=71d31313027055091096d5f8facbc72a44bbb257
- Drift Watch workflow run proof: status=completed; conclusion=failure; url=https://github.com/biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects/actions/runs/27172216127; headSha=71d31313027055091096d5f8facbc72a44bbb257
- Evidence freshness proof: generatedAt=2026-06-08T22:59:10.279Z; evidenceFresh=true; evidenceExpiresAt=2026-06-09T22:59:10.279Z; postPublishEvidenceReady=false
- Release receipt proof: postLaunchVerificationReceipt=available; status=not ready to archive
- Public claim guard proof: repoEvidenceReady=true; pagesEvidenceReady=false; workflowEvidenceReady=false; readyForExternalClaim=false

Required proof commands:
1. gh api repos/biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects/pages
2. gh run list --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --workflow joopark-pages.yml --limit 1 --json databaseId,status,conclusion,url,headSha,createdAt,updatedAt,event,displayTitle
3. gh run list --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --workflow joopark-drift-watch.yml --limit 1 --json databaseId,status,conclusion,url,headSha,createdAt,updatedAt,event,displayTitle
4. node scripts/capture-publish-evidence.mjs --live --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --write
5. node scripts/capture-publish-evidence.mjs --live --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --markdown
6. copy System Status quality receipt after readyForExternalClaim=true

Next proof actions:
1. Pages site proof: nextAction=Run gh api repos/biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects/pages after the Pages workflow succeeds, then paste html_url, status=built, and https_enforced=true.
2. Pages workflow run proof: nextAction=Run gh run list --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --workflow joopark-pages.yml --limit 1 --json databaseId,status,conclusion,url,headSha,createdAt,updatedAt,event,displayTitle and paste status=completed, conclusion=success, url, and headSha.
3. Drift Watch workflow run proof: nextAction=Run gh run list --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --workflow joopark-drift-watch.yml --limit 1 --json databaseId,status,conclusion,url,headSha,createdAt,updatedAt,event,displayTitle and paste status=completed, conclusion=success, url, and headSha.
4. Evidence freshness proof: nextAction=Run node scripts/capture-publish-evidence.mjs --live --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --write after both workflow runs succeed, then paste generatedAt, evidenceFresh=true, evidenceExpiresAt, and postPublishEvidenceReady=true.
5. Release receipt proof: nextAction=Run node scripts/capture-publish-evidence.mjs --live --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --markdown and paste the archive-ready post-launch verification receipt only after live proof is ready.
6. Public claim guard proof: nextAction=Run node scripts/capture-output-quality-audit.mjs --write after live proof is ready, then paste readyForExternalClaim=true and the external claim guard receipt.

Acceptance criteria:
- Pages site proof: GitHub Pages site API must provide html_url, built status, and HTTPS enforcement.
- Pages workflow run proof: Latest joopark-pages.yml run must be completed successfully and linked.
- Drift Watch workflow run proof: Latest joopark-drift-watch.yml run must be completed successfully and linked.
- Evidence freshness proof: Saved evidence must be generated after dispatch and remain inside the freshness window.
- Release receipt proof: Post-launch verification receipt must be archive-ready only after live Pages and workflow evidence is ready.
- Public claim guard proof: Public claim remains blocked until release quality, live proof, and launch-packet external-claim guard are all true.

Blockers:
- GitHub Pages site html_url/status evidence is not ready
- pages: latest workflow run is not completed with success conclusion
- drift-watch: latest workflow run is not completed with success conclusion

Stop condition: do not post public launch copy, archive proof, or claim readyForExternalClaim until all six evidence fields are live, fresh, linked, and successful.
